title: Add train_gpt_13 trainer and SDPA GQA compatibility guard in train_gpt
author: vanivamshi

data.description: Adds a compatibility guard for SDPA enable_gqa support and falls back to repeating KV heads when unavailable.
Adds a train_gpt_13 PyTorch trainer stack.

novel_contributions: Added a train_gpt_13 PyTorch trainer stack
Added an import-time guard for SDPA enable_gqa support
Implemented fallback KV repeat_interleave when enable_gqa is unavailable
